submit.successBody: We have everything we need to get going.

you.title: Tell me about your situation.
you.subtitle: Two questions to start.
you.incomeHelper: Salary and regular extras. You can refine later.

fixed_costs.title: Your 4 main expenses.
fixed_costs.subtitle: A ballpark is enough. No need for precision.
fixed_costs.helper: A rough number is fine. The coach will refine with you over time.

main_goal.title: What do you want to work on first?
main_goal.subtitle: You can add more later.

income.title: Your monthly income.
income.subtitle: What actually comes in, after tax.
income.label: Net monthly income
income.helper: Enter what comes in each month, from every source combined.

expenses.title: Your monthly expenses.
expenses.subtitle: An honest estimate is more than enough.

savings.title: Your available savings.
savings.subtitle: Accessible cash, excluding real estate.
savings.label: Available savings
savings.emergencyFundTitle: I have a dedicated emergency fund
savings.emergencyFundHelper: A separate amount, untouchable except for emergencies (ideally 3-6 months of expenses).

goal.title: Which goal are you aiming for?
goal.subtitle: One at a time is more effective.

behavior.title: How would you describe your relationship with money?
behavior.subtitle: Pick what fits (as many as you want).

stress.title: Your stress level.
stress.subtitle: To track your peace of mind over time.

insight.title: Here's what we'll keep in mind.
insight.subtitle: A first glimpse of your situation — we'll dig deeper together.
insight.footnote: These first numbers are computed from your answers. As you log your real data, the coach will refine its recommendations.

struggling.label: I'm struggling
struggling.description: My expenses are higher than my income.

tight.label: I'm just getting by
tight.description: I finish the month with no margin.

stable.label: I'm stable
stable.description: I manage to put a little aside.

comfortable.label: I'm comfortable
comfortable.description: I save and want to optimise.

avoidant.label: I avoid looking
avoidant.description: My finances stress me out, I'd rather not think about them.

organized.label: Rather organised
organized.description: I track things, I like to know where money goes.

anxious.label: Anxious about money
anxious.description: Thinking about money makes me tense.

lost.label: A bit lost
lost.description: I don't know where to start anymore.

disciplined.label: Disciplined
disciplined.description: I keep my commitments when I make them.

rebuilding.label: Rebuilding
rebuilding.description: I'm coming out of a rough patch, climbing back up.
